headline: Shares of auto-related companies are trading higher, possibly amid a drop in the price of oil, which may raise demand.
summary: Shares of auto-related companies are trading higher, possibly amid a drop in the price of oil, which may raise demand.

headline: Aptiv’s Winchester Interconnect Launches Modulus™ Connector Platform for LEO and Drone Programs
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, March 23, 2026--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global industrial technology company and Winchester Interconnect, an Aptiv company and leading supplier of high-performance interconnect solutions, today launched Modulus™, a ruggedized, modular connector platform that combines high-speed Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) and configurable power in a compact, field-serviceable design. Built for emerging Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite programs and unmanned aerial systems (UAS), Modulus
